narrative_votes: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The headline and repeated statements in the text explicitly evoke fear by predicting a nuclear attack on the US and UK, framing it as a direct consequence of Western support for Ukraine.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन आक्रामक मूड में है और अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन की मदद से रूस पर ड्रोन हमले कर रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement shifts the focus from Russia's invasion to portraying Ukraine as the aggressor, actively attacking Russia with Western help, thereby blaming the conflict escalation on Ukraine and its supporters.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमले के लिए पश्चिमी देशों द्वारा आपूर्ति किए गए हथियारों का उपयोग करने की इजाजत देने का मतलब होगा कि रूस और नाटो के बीच युद्ध चल रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This frames Russia's position as one of being forced into a conflict with NATO due to Western actions (arming Ukraine), portraying Russia as reacting to external provocation and victimization by a broader alliance.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The headline and repeated statements about a potential nuclear attack on the US and UK are designed to evoke fear and anxiety about an escalation to nuclear conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन आक्रामक मूड में है और अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन की मदद से रूस पर ड्रोन हमले कर रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement frames Ukraine as the aggressor conducting attacks with Western help, shifting blame away from Russia's role as the initial invader.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमले के लिए पश्चिमी देशों द्वारा आपूर्ति किए गए हथियारों का उपयोग करने की इजाजत देने का मतलब होगा कि रूस और नाटो के बीच युद्ध चल रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This portrays Russia as being forced into a conflict with NATO due to Western actions (arming Ukraine), framing Russia as reacting to external threats rather than being the aggressor.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The headline and repeated statements in the text explicitly evoke fear of a nuclear attack on the US and UK, which is designed to create anxiety about severe escalation and consequences.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन आक्रामक मूड में है और अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन की मदद से रूस पर ड्रोन हमले कर रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement frames Ukraine as the aggressor conducting attacks with Western help, shifting blame for the conflict away from Russia, the initial invader.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमले के लिए पश्चिमी देशों द्वारा आपूर्ति किए गए हथियारों का उपयोग करने की इजाजत देने का मतलब होगा कि रूस और नाटो के बीच युद्ध चल रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This portrays Russia as being forced into a conflict with NATO due to Western actions (supplying weapons), framing Russia as reacting to external provocation and victimization.
